title: poa macrocalyx subsp. sugawarae
intro: Poa macrocalyx subsp. sugawarae, also known as Japanese meadow-grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Poa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Poa macrocalyx subsp. sugawarae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Poa macrocalyx subsp. sugawarae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
